items.title: 17 Best Prime Day Fitness Tech Deals (2026) Up to $250 Off
items.summary: I've compiled a list of the best fitness tech deals this Amazon Prime Day, including smartwatches, walking pads, and recovery gear. You can thank me later.

items.title: From Fortnite to robots: General Intuition raises $2.3B on bet that video games can train AI agents for the real world
items.summary: General Intuition has raised $320 million to scale AI trained on millions of hours of gameplay, betting action data can help AI develop something closer to human intuition.
